query: heavy fog mist obscured figure barely visible silhouette
message: sub:bad_or_no_details/fog_silhouette — anti_aesthetic — figures lost in mist, dissolved silhouettes, monochrome haze

response.objective_caption: A black and white photograph of a fog-covered lake with a silhouetted person fishing from a small wooden dock on the right side of the frame. Distant shoreline trees and bushes are partially obscured by thick mist rising from the calm water. Sparse reeds and grasses protrude from the lake surface in the immediate foreground. The figure holds a fishing rod while standing at the edge of the dock, with the still water reflecting the overcast sky and obscured landscape.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white photograph of a fog-covered lake rendered in a muted, desaturated monochrome palette with low vibrancy. Flat, directionless lighting eliminates shadows and collapses depth across the entire frame, while crushed midtones and weak separation between light and dark create a heavy, oppressive atmosphere. A silhouetted figure stands fishing on a small wooden dock at the right edge, isolated against distant shoreline trees that dissolve into the gray haze. Sparse reeds emerge from the still water in the foreground, adding subtle vertical accents to the otherwise tonally flat and suffocating scene.
